task_completion.description: An itinerary document or spreadsheet is created and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet, or document viewer is open showing a planned itinerary spanning 7 days.
A specific column or text field shows the running total of miles hiked, culminating at exactly 67.9 miles by the end of the trip.

task_completion.description: The itinerary includes hiking time estimates based on distance and elevation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Time estimates (in hours) are listed for the segments or daily totals, calculated using the provided formula.

task_completion.description: Day 3 is flagged for exceeding safe elevation limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clear warning, highlight, or flag is present on Day 3 noting the steep climb, specifically referencing the 3200 ft segment or 3800 ft daily total exceeding the 3000 ft safe limit.

task_completion.description: Day 4 is flagged for exceeding safe hiking time limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clear warning, highlight, or flag is present on Day 4 noting the long duration, specifically referencing the 10.1 hours total exceeding the 10-hour safe limit.

integrity.description: The agent used a proper application to format the itinerary.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final itinerary is presented in a GUI application like a text editor, spreadsheet (e.g., Calc/Excel), or markdown viewer, rather than just being printed to a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent performed actual calculations for the times and distances.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show evidence of calculation, such as spreadsheet formulas in the formula bar, a calculator app open, or a Python script being written/executed to process the CSV data.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided trail data without hallucinating segments.
integrity.visual_evidence: The itinerary reflects exactly 14 segments over 7 days, matching the provided synthetic data, rather than making up generic trail names or copying an external real-world trail.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct itinerary spans 7 days with 14 segments. The final cumulative distance must be exactly 67.9 miles. Hiking time is calculated as (Distance/2.5) + (Elevation_Gain/1000). Day 3 must be flagged for risky elevation (it has a 3200 ft segment and 3800 ft total, exceeding the 3000 ft safe limit). Day 4 must be flagged for excessive duration (it totals 10.1 hours, exceeding the 10-hour safe limit). No individual segment exceeds 6 hours.
